{{Quote|Star Destroyer ''Adamant'', this is the ''Etherway''. I congratulate you on your vigilance; I was afraid I was going to have to search the next five systems to find an Imperial ship.|Mara Jade|<ref name="Dark Force Rising" />}}
The '''''Adamant '''''was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] that served within the [[Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)|armada]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].<ref name="Dark Force Rising" />

==History==
===Service under Thrawn===
With the return of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], he found that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which was [[Battle of Endor/Legends|fragmented]] as [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admirals]], and [[General/Legends|Generals]] became [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] and forged their own splinter groups from the Empire. Thrawn would eventually assemble a [[Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)|large]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] capable enough of [[Thrawn campaign|threatening]] the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

===Mission to Abregado system===
{{Quote|Freighter ''Etherway'', this is the Star Destroyer ''Adamant''. You are ordered to shut down your engines and prepare to be brought aboard.|An unidentified Imperial|<ref name="Dark Force Rising" />}}
Thrawn dispatched the ''Adamant ''to the [[Abregado system/Legends|Abregado system]] to capture [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], believing that she would lead him to [[Talon Karrde]], who he wished to deal with for his role in helping [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] previously escape Imperial forces. When the ''Adamant'' ordered Jade's ship, the ''[[Etherway]]'', to dock, Jade surpirsed the crewmember contacting her by demanding to board and speak with Thrawn himself, claiming she had information for him. Taken aback, the crewmember obliged and the ''Adamant'' used its [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] to land the ''Etherway'' in one of its [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]].
